title: Yamunotri Temple
tagline: Yamunotri Temple — spiritual town of Uttarakhand

overview.short: Yamunotri Temple is a Hindu temple, situated in the western region of Garhwal Himalayas at an altitude of 3,291 metres (10,797 ft) in Uttarkashi district, Uttarakhand, India.
overview.description: Yamunotri Temple is a Hindu temple, situated in the western region of Garhwal Himalayas at an altitude of 3,291 metres (10,797 ft) in Uttarkashi district, Uttarakhand, India. It's just 129 km from Uttarkashi, the main district headquarters. The temple is dedicated to Goddess Yamuna, and has a black marble idol of the goddess. The actual temple is only accessible by a 13 kilometres (8.1 mi) trek from the town of Hanuman Chatti and a 6 kilometres (3.7 mi) walk from Janki Chatti; horses or palanquins are available for rent.

topPlaces.name: Yamunotri
topPlaces.description: Yamunotri, also Jamnotri, is the source of the Yamuna River and the seat of the Goddess Yamuna in Hinduism. It is situated at an altitude of 3,293 metres (10,804 ft) in the Garhwal Himalayas and located approximately 150 kilometres (93 mi) North of Uttarkashi, the headquarters of the Uttarkashi district in the Garhwal Division of Uttarakhand, India.

items.note: Yamunotri, also Jamnotri, is the source of the Yamuna River and the seat of the Goddess Yamuna in Hinduism. It is situated at an altitude of 3,293 metres (10,804 ft) in the Garhwal Himalayas and located approximately 150 kilometres (93 mi) North of Uttarkashi, the headquarters of the Uttarkashi district in the Garhwal Division of Uttarakhand, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Yamunotri Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Yamunotri Temple is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Yamunotri Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Dehradun Airport (Jolly Grant) (96 km) and the nearest railway station is Dehradun Railway Station (87 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Yamunotri Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Yamunotri Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Yamunotri Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Yamunotri Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.
